name: com.ackeskin.unity-mcp
description: Custom Unity Editor extension that exposes the Editor to MCP clients (Claude Code, Cursor, VSCode) over a local HTTP bridge. ~70 typed tools across scenes, GameObjects, components, assets, prefabs, materials, UI, scripts, tests, packages, vision (2D + 6DoF scene capture), and XR/MRTK3 introspection. Tools are advertised dynamically from a capability descriptor, so the MCP server stays a thin protocol shim. See README.md for the tool surface and install steps.
